framework.name: Danish Energy Agency Cybersecurity Requirements
framework.scope: Cybersecurity requirements for Danish energy sector operators including electricity, gas, oil, and district heating
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by domains: governance, OT security, incident management, supply security, and supply chain.

controls.title: Management responsibility for cybersecurity in energy sector
controls.description: Management in energy companies must approve and continuously monitor cybersecurity measures in accordance with NIS2/sector regulation.
controls.description_nl: Ledelsen i energivirksomheder skal godkende og loebende overvage cybersikkerhedsforanstaltninger i henhold til NIS2/sektorregulering.

controls.title: Cybersecurity policy for energy companies
controls.description: Energy companies must have a documented cybersecurity policy that addresses both IT and OT environments.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal have en dokumenteret cybersikkerhedspolitik der adresserer bade IT- og OT-miljoeer.

controls.title: Risk assessment for critical energy infrastructure
controls.description: Energy companies must conduct regular risk assessment with particular focus on OT systems and their connection to IT networks.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal gennemfoere regelmaessig risikovurdering med saerligt fokus pa OT-systemer og deres forbindelse til IT-netvaerk.

controls.title: Security for SCADA systems
controls.description: SCADA systems in the energy sector must be protected with network isolation, access control, and monitoring in accordance with IEC 62351 and IEC 62443.
controls.description_nl: SCADA-systemer i energisektoren skal beskyttes med netvaerksisolering, adgangskontrol og overvagning i henhold til IEC 62351 og IEC 62443.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer DMZ mellem SCADA og virksomhedsnetvaerk. Anvend unidirektionelle gateways for dataoverfoersel.

controls.title: Remote access to SCADA and control systems
controls.description: Remote access to SCADA systems must be restricted and use dedicated, encrypted connections with MFA and session monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgang til SCADA-systemer skal begraenses og ske via dedikerede, krypterede forbindelser med MFA og sessionovervagning.

controls.title: Smart grid security
controls.description: Smart grid components including smart meters and distribution automation must be protected with encryption and authentication.
controls.description_nl: Smart grid-komponenter inklusiv smarte maalere og distributionsautomatisering skal beskyttes med kryptering og autentifikation.

controls.title: Hardening of energy OT systems
controls.description: OT systems in the energy sector must be hardened by disabling unnecessary services, default credentials, and unused protocols.
controls.description_nl: OT-systemer i energisektoren skal haerdes med deaktivering af unoedvendige tjenester, standardadgangskoder og ikke-anvendte protokoller.

controls.title: Reporting cyber incidents to Danish Energy Agency
controls.description: Significant cyber incidents in the energy sector must be reported to the Danish Energy Agency and SectorCERT within NIS2 deadlines.
controls.description_nl: Vasentlige cyberhaendelser i energisektoren skal rapporteres til Energistyrelsen og SektorCERT inden for NIS2-fristerne.
controls.implementation_guidance: Foelg SektorCERTs rapporteringsskabelon. Tidlig advarsel inden 24 timer, fuld underretning inden 72 timer.

controls.title: Connection to SectorCERT
controls.description: Energy companies must be connected to SectorCERT to receive threat warnings and share information about cyber threats.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal vaere tilsluttet SektorCERT for at modtage trusselsadvarsler og dele information om cybertrusler.

controls.title: Cyber contingency plan for energy sector
controls.description: Energy companies must have a cyber contingency plan addressing scenarios with cyber attacks on production and distribution systems.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal have en cyberberedskabsplan der adresserer scenarier med cyberangreb mod produktions- og distributionssystemer.

controls.title: Operational continuity for critical energy systems
controls.description: Critical energy systems must have redundancy and contingency plans ensuring supply continuity during cyber incidents.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske energisystemer skal have redundans og beredskabsplaner der sikrer forsyningskontinuitet ved cyberhaendelser.

controls.title: Backup and recovery of control systems
controls.description: Configurations and software for energy control systems must be regularly backed up with offline storage.
controls.description_nl: Konfigurationer og software for energikontrolsystemer skal sikkerhedskopieres regelmaessigt med offline-opbevaring.

controls.title: Cybersecurity exercises for energy sector
controls.description: Energy companies must participate in sector exercises coordinated by SectorCERT and the Danish Energy Agency at least annually.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal deltage i sektoroevelser koordineret af SektorCERT og Energistyrelsen mindst arligt.

controls.title: Security requirements for energy vendors
controls.description: Vendors of equipment and software for the energy sector must comply with specific security requirements and undergo security assessment.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer af udstyr og software til energisektoren skal overholde specifikke sikkerhedskrav og gennemga sikkerhedsvurdering.

controls.title: Security in energy supply chain
controls.description: Energy companies must assess cybersecurity risks throughout the supply chain including hardware, software, and service vendors.
controls.description_nl: Energivirksomheder skal vurdere cybersikkerhedsrisici i hele forsyningskaeden inklusiv hardware-, software- og serviceleverandoerer.
